loop_goal: Keep rescoring the fully promoted next-version baseline and route the next bounded expansion slice through the same governed portfolio loop.

active_workers.current_task: Collected repeated feedback on market-intelligence distribution needs and proved the leadership-digest path without weakening the existing guardrails.
Routed the prior sub-5 market-intelligence gap into a bounded distribution hardening path and closed it.
Prepare the next bounded expansion choice now that the current named baseline is fully promoted.

review_gate.exit_condition: The proposed fix must directly address the observed PM communication and planning pain.

validation_gate.exit_condition: The fix must reduce manual rewrite and planning translation work relative to the prior baseline.

pm_decision_gate.exit_condition: The PM must accept the completed hardening cycle and route the next bounded expansion choice through the same governed loop.

next_recommended_action: Refresh the portfolio after the next dogfood window and use it to choose the next bounded expansion slice.
